mnemonics.title: Service Types
mnemonics.content: SBI - Started, Bound, IntentService. Started runs independently, Bound connects to clients, IntentService queues and auto-stops.

mnemonics.title: Service Lifecycle Methods
mnemonics.content: CSB-URD: Create, StartCommand, Bind - Unbind, Rebind, Destroy. These are the six key callback methods in a Service lifecycle.

mnemonics.title: onStartCommand Return Values
mnemonics.content: SNR: Sticky (restart with null), Not-sticky (don't restart), Redeliver (restart with last intent)

mnemonics.title: Foreground Service Rule
mnemonics.content: No Notification = No Foreground. A foreground service MUST show a persistent notification to the user.

mnemonics.title: Bound Service Communication
mnemonics.content: BMA: Binder (local), Messenger (IPC simple), AIDL (IPC complex) - the three ways clients communicate with bound services.
